title: +3 Wand of the War Mage
excerpt: While holding this wand, you gain a +3 bonus to spell attack rolls. In addition, you ignore cover Cover when making a spell attack roll....
markdown:
# +3 Wand of the War Mage

While holding this wand, you gain a +3 bonus to spell attack rolls. In addition, you ignore [[cover Cover]] when making a spell attack roll.
